pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property to 21 to align with the target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the build will compile against Java 8 semantics, failing to utilize Java 21 features or potentially causing compatibility issues if the project intends to run on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Bump Google Guava dependency version from 28.1-jre to 29.0-jre.
